facebook.caption: 4.6 stars. 801 reviews. This coffee shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps delivering. Island Phu Quoc sits right on the main strip, easy to find, hard to leave. Order, sit, watch the street move. No fuss. Just good coffee where the locals actually return. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
